task_completion.description: Navigate to the user creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the Odoo Settings > Users page with a blank form open to create a new user.
The VLM should see 'Sarah Johnson' typed into the 'Name' field of the user form.
The VLM should see 'sarah.johnson@yourcompany.example.com' typed into the 'Email Address' or 'Login' field.
Under the 'Access Rights' tab, the dropdown next to 'Sales' must be explicitly set to 'User: Own Documents Only'.
The VLM should see the user profile saved successfully, indicated by the absence of the 'Save' button (replaced by 'Edit' or a saved cloud icon) and the user's name in the breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Direct Sales team configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the 'Sales Teams' configuration page (typically in CRM or Sales app) with the 'Direct Sales' team opened.

task_completion.description: Add the user to the sales team
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Sarah Johnson' added to the 'Members' list or tab within the 'Direct Sales' team configuration.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the Odoo web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) should not be open or used to manipulate the DOM.
Screenshots should show a logical progression through Odoo menus (Settings -> Users, CRM -> Sales Teams) rather than jumping instantly to disconnected states.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Name: 'Sarah Johnson'. Target Email: 'sarah.johnson@yourcompany.example.com'. Target Team: 'Direct Sales'. Required Access: 'User: Own Documents Only' (Odoo group: sales_team.group_sale_salesman). The user must NOT have Manager/Administrator access for Sales (sales_team.group_sale_manager).
